description.ko: 기하학적인 유리 구조를 통과하는 빛이 미니멀한 배경 위로 화려한 무지개색으로 흩어지는 시각적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of light passing through a geometric glass structure, dispersing into a vibrant array of rainbow colors against a minimalist background.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of a crystalline triangular prism on a clean white surface, a single beam of pure white light hitting the edge and refracting into a brilliant, detailed spectrum of colors, soft caustic patterns, 8k resolution, ray tracing, ethereal atmosphere, minimalist aesthetic.
